scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.PurchaseOrder_CountryViewer
scopes.description: View purchase orders restricted to a Country

attributes.name: Country

role-templates.name: PurchaseOrder_CountryViewer_India

role-templates.name: Employee_Viewer_London
